title: Grus
description: Topics referred to by the same term
extract:
Grus may refer to:Grus (bird), a genus of birds in the crane family
Grus grus, the common crane
Grus (constellation), the constellation "Crane"
Grus (geology), an accumulation of angular, coarse-grained fragments resulting from the granular disintegration of crystalline rocks
extract_html:
Grus may refer to:

  • Grus (bird), a genus of birds in the crane family
    • Grus grus, the common crane
  • Grus (constellation), the constellation "Crane"
  • Grus (geology), an accumulation of angular, coarse-grained fragments resulting from the granular disintegration of crystalline rocks
